name: neruva-mcp
summary: MCP server for Neruva agent memory + reasoning substrate. Records, 5-engine KG (OPB / quorum / multishard / feature-bundle / Hadamard), federated agent_remember/recall/context, Pearl do-operator, HD analogy, CBR, concept blend. Cognitive primitives: depth-unlimited theory of mind, counterfactual rollouts, schema lifting, EFE planning, continual learning, hierarchical chunking, rule induction. Snapshot/restore replay. .neruva container. Drop into Claude Code / Cursor / Codex / Gemini CLI. Sub-100ms p95.
